tasks.name: Create activity schema types file

action.target: activity.schema.ts file with discriminated union types

tasks.purpose: Define TypeScript types for unified activity items from multiple sources

constraints: Use discriminated union for type safety
All activity types must have common timestamp field

tasks.output_state: activity.schema.ts with ActivityItem discriminated union and LoadActivityFeedParams interface
tasks.acceptance_criterion: File exports ActivityItem union type with 4 variants and LoadActivityFeedParams interface
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/schema/activity.schema.ts && grep -q 'export type ActivityItem' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/schema/activity.schema.ts && grep -q 'export interface LoadActivityFeedParams' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/schema/activity.schema.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create activity loader function skeleton

action.target: activity-feed.loader.ts with server-only directive and function signature

tasks.purpose: Set up server-side loader infrastructure with logging and type safety

constraints: Import 'server-only' at top
Follow established loader pattern from members-page.loader.ts
Use createServiceLogger for error logging

tasks.output_state: activity-feed.loader.ts with loadActivityFeed function signature and logger setup
tasks.acceptance_criterion: File exists with server-only directive, logger, and loadActivityFeed function that accepts LoadActivityFeedParams
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/activity-feed.loader.ts && grep -q "import 'server-only'" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/activity-feed.loader.ts && grep -q 'createServiceLogger' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/activity-feed.loader.ts && grep -q 'export async function loadActivityFeed' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/activity-feed.loader.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add lesson progress query function
tasks.purpose: Query lesson_progress table for completed lessons with timestamps

constraints: Filter where completed_at IS NOT NULL
Filter by date range (last N days)
Map to ActivityItem type with type='lesson_completion'

tasks.output_state: fetchLessonCompletions function queries lesson_progress and returns ActivityItem[]
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function queries lesson_progress, filters by completed_at and date range, maps to lesson_completion ActivityItem type
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'async function fetchLessonCompletions' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/activity-feed.loader.ts && grep -q "from('lesson_progress')" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/activity-feed.loader.ts && grep -q "type: 'lesson_completion'" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/activity-feed.loader.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add quiz attempts query function

tasks.output_state: fetchQuizAttempts function queries quiz_attempts and returns ActivityItem[]

tasks.name: Add survey completions query function
tasks.purpose: Query survey_responses table for completed assessments

dependencies: survey_responses table with completed field and category scores
constraints: Filter where completed = true
Filter by date range (last N days based on updated_at)
Map to ActivityItem type with type='survey_completion'
Include highest category if available

tasks.output_state: fetchSurveyCompletions function queries survey_responses and returns ActivityItem[]
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function queries survey_responses, filters by completed and date range, maps to survey_completion ActivityItem type
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'async function fetchSurveyCompletions' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/activity-feed.loader.ts && grep -q "from('survey_responses')" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/activity-feed.loader.ts && grep -q "type: 'survey_completion'" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/activity-feed.loader.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add activity merger and sorting logic
tasks.purpose: Combine all activity sources, sort by timestamp, and apply limits

constraints: Merge arrays from all sources
Sort by timestamp descending (newest first)
Apply limit parameter
Handle empty arrays gracefully

tasks.input_state: All 4 fetch functions exist and return ActivityItem[]
tasks.output_state: mergeAndSortActivities function combines, sorts, and limits activity items
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function takes 4 ActivityItem arrays, merges them, sorts by timestamp desc, applies limit, returns sorted array

tasks.name: Wire loadActivityFeed to use parallel fetching

action.target: loadActivityFeed main function to fetch all sources in parallel

tasks.purpose: Orchestrate parallel data fetching for 60-80% performance improvement

constraints: Use Promise.all() for parallel execution
Handle errors from any source gracefully
Log errors but don't fail entire request if one source fails
Return ActivityFeedResult with items and pagination metadata

tasks.input_state: All fetch functions and merger exist
tasks.output_state: loadActivityFeed executes all 4 fetches in parallel, merges results, returns ActivityFeedResult
tasks.acceptance_criterion: loadActivityFeed uses Promise.all to fetch from all 4 sources, merges with mergeAndSortActivities, returns result with hasMore flag
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'Promise.all' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/activity-feed.loader.ts && grep -q 'fetchLessonCompletions' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/activity-feed.loader.ts && grep -q 'fetchQuizAttempts' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/activity-feed.loader.ts && grep -q 'fetchPresentationUpdates' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/activity-feed.loader.ts && grep -q 'fetchSurveyCompletions' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/activity-feed.loader.ts && grep -q 'mergeAndSortActivities' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/activity-feed.loader.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add pagination support to activity loader
tasks.purpose: Enable paginated activity feed for large datasets

constraints: Use offset-based pagination (simpler than cursor for multi-source)
Calculate hasMore by fetching limit+1 items
Generate nextCursor from offset + limit

tasks.input_state: loadActivityFeed returns basic results without pagination
tasks.output_state: loadActivityFeed supports cursor parameter, returns hasMore flag and nextCursor
tasks.acceptance_criterion: loadActivityFeed accepts cursor, fetches limit+1 items, sets hasMore if extra item exists, returns nextCursor for next page
